rulings.Case Title: BARBARA WOLFE VS. MARGARET STENGEL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: CROSS DEFENDANT BARBARA WOLFE DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT TENTATIVE RULING: 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION( BREACH OF CONTRACT-SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NEEDS PROVIDE DETAILS OF CONTRACT (WRITTEN, ORAL, OR IMPLIED; TERMS) 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION(NIED)-SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NEEDS TO PROVIDE FACTS TO ASSERT ELEMENTS OF NEGLIGENCE (DUTY, BREACH,CAUSATION, DAMAGES). 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION-SUSTAIN WITH A LEAVE TO AMEND. NEEDS TO PROVIDE FACTS ELEMENTS OF NEGLIGENCE. 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION-(TORTIOUS INTERFERENCE W/ CONTRACTUAL RELATIONS)-SUSTAIN W/ LEAVE TO AMEND.CANNOT ALLEGE AGAINST TO THE CONTRACT. MOTION TO STRIKE MOOT CROSS COMPLAINANT HAS STIPULATED TO REMOVE.(302/AJR/RS)
